/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/logistic128_secfloat.dir/main_logistic128.cpp.o  -o ../bin/logistic128_secfloat ../lib/libSCI-SecfloatML.a ../lib/libSCI-FloatingPoint.a ../lib/libSCI-BuildingBlocks.a ../lib/libSCI-Math.a ../lib/libSCI-GC.a ../lib/libSCI-LinearOT.a ../lib/libSCI-OT.a ../lib/libSCI-FloatingPoint.a ../lib/libSCI-BuildingBlocks.a ../lib/libSCI-Math.a ../lib/libSCI-GC.a ../lib/libSCI-LinearOT.a ../lib/libSCI-OT.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so -pthread
